spec_match.rationale: The inspector now uses three actual selectedcontent descendants and observes those nodes directly with MutationObserver.

interactive.rationale: Changing the select logs observer records, updates counters, and reports whether all mirrors contain the newly selected option text.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The copy now describes observer records from native selectedcontent mirrors instead of synthetic microsecond loop timing.

edge_cases.rationale: A fallback clone shim keeps the real selectedcontent nodes observable in browsers that have selectedcontent parsing but not Chrome 150 multi-clone updates.

references.rationale: Includes companion demo links and ChromeStatus.

design_system.rationale: Preserves the original counter and log affordances while keeping all UI colors on shared variables.

summary: Resolved: the sync inspector now measures real selectedcontent mutation records rather than a synchronous JavaScript loop over ordinary divs.
